runners.formComment: Has finished last in his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 320m. Mixing his form but shapes as a genuine chance under these conditions.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked approaching the 320m boxes and lost momentum.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (18.70) at this track in a Free For All, finishing fifth and beaten 8 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and five minors. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

runners.formComment: Last start finished eighth over 320m at this track, beaten 11 lengths (19.22) behind No More Trouble in a Mix 2/3 on April 8. Others read better.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 9 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Gillenbah Tiger beaten 6 lengths (30.85) in a Mix 3/4. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.
